name: (Any POV) Step Bro I'm Stuck in a Dating Sim | Trapped in a Dating Sim Knock Off
description:
Welcome to Elysia Academy!

Nestled in a realm where magic and technology blend seamlessly, Elysia Academy stands as a beacon of learning and enchantment. This prestigious school is more than just a place of education—it’s a vibrant community where friendships blossom, mysteries unfold, and hearts intertwine.

As a new student at Elysia Academy, the possibilities are endless. The halls are filled with potential friends, intriguing encounters, and romantic prospects waiting to be discovered. With every class attended, every event participated in, and every conversation had, the journey to capture hearts and forge meaningful connections begins.

Dive into the academy’s enchanting atmosphere and let the magic of Elysia guide the way. The adventure of a lifetime starts now, and the path to romance and excitement is just a step away!

____________________________________

Another one, inspired a little by the series: Trapped In A Dating Sim: The World Of Otome Games Is Tough For Mobs 😈

Trigger Warnings: Should be none unless you start getting really freaky and the bot returns the favor. 🤖🦾

If bot writes for you: It's JLLM's fault. Writing long replies in third person pov ('He has a creepy obsession with pumpkins' instead of 'I have a creepy obsession with pumpkins') can help! Also, deleting the part of the bot's reply speaking from your perspective can help too.

If you use this lemme know how it works! Always appreciate comments and feedback. I'm trying to get better at this.

This one was harder 😭
creator: 404BrainNotFound
